channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Broken glass in playground, 26th April
item.description:
There is broken glass all over the ground in the playground. This needs to be cleaned up asap to avoid serious injury to children.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blenheim Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven paving stone outside 7 Heath Rise, 26th April
item.description:
There is an uneven paving stone outside 7 Heath Rise next to the street tree that is beyond the Council's 'trip limit'. Please would you inspect and carry out remedial work to re-lay the stone so that it lies flat again.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heath Rise, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pallet left leaning on bike hangar., 26th April
item.description:
It's been there a few days

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Montague Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bikes blocking pavement and access to water fountain, 26th April
item.description:
Lime bikes are littered across the pavement blocking pedestrian access and access to the water fountain. Appears it is being used as a storage space.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lambeth Palace Road, Lambeth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous ramp, 26th April
item.description:
This relates to the pavement outside 454 Finchley Rd, London NW11 8DG. There is no continuous pavement or access. A steep and dangerous ramp has been added to help those with mobility issues get back onto the pavement but it is far too steep and at a strange angle to be safe, I nearly fell out of my wheelchair getting down it. A dropped curb should be added and suitable markings for those with eyesight issues.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 454, Finchley Road, Golders Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 26th April
item.description:
Discarded tyres
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stansfield Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Access issue, 26th April
item.description:
There is a crossing on hermitage lane, however the access for those with mobility issues and those with eyesight issues is dangerous. Instead of a proper pavement, the pavement is cut off and there is only a small ramp that is very abrupt/steep. There are also no appropriate markings for those with eyesight issues. It's dangerous and needs addressing before someone has an accident, especially as it's on a busy road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hermitage Lane, Golders Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 26th April
item.description:
Discarded household waste

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stansfield Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Random bin, 26th April
item.description:
This green lid bin has just suddenly appeared outside 47 greenfield road . It’s not theirs because they don’t have one . Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Greenfield Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped child car seat, 26th April
item.description:
Dumped on pavement, blocking pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge landfill site, 26th April
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and bed fly tipped, 26th April
item.description:
The mattress and bed have been dumped for the last 2 weeks Please would it be possible to remove them Thankyou

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Kneller Road, Brockley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 26th April
item.description:
One of the businesses keeps just leaving the rubbish out here for days happens every week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken and uneven Slab, 26th April
item.description:
Slabs have been broken and uneven for best part of 2 years. Have been reported but claimed not bad enough, slabs have some edges raised by 20-25mm and are a serious trip hazard as well as noise complaints by local residents

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Elmcroft Avenue, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 26th April
item.description:
Dead fox

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Elmers End Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 26th April
item.description:
Looks recent

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Elmers End Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A127 potholes after getting of M25 junction, 26th April
item.description:
Over 10 potholes from M25 to the Strawberry farm part of the lane. The left lane especially is bad. The picture provided have coordinates of the potholes but in general the road condition is bad due the very uneven surface after the roundabout on top of the at least a dozen of potholes.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southend Arterial Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped Scooter & other rubbish, 26th April
item.description:
Someone has dumped a childs scooter, broken chair and other rubbish on the grass area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mottingham Lane, Mottingham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive potholes on A127 after getting of M25, 26th April
item.description:
The pictures include GPS coordinates of multiple potholes. There is more to report on that part of the road and I will include in another report. The road is completely ruined on that section, uneven and massive potholes, especially in the left lane. The conditions are appaling.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southend Arterial Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light out, 26th April
item.description:
Light opposite 16 Mountview Road Orpington isn't working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mountview Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
